title: Task-switch hygiene
failure_mode: Old unrelated auth/docs/test work pollutes a new parser task.
output_preview: {"current_task":"Fix the CSV header parser so it trims spaces around comma-separated header names.","proposed_fix":"Find the header parsing logic and trim whitespace around each parsed header name after splitting on commas, preserving existing behavior otherwise.","stale_context_policy":"Ignore prior unrelated context unless a context-management tool explicitly marks it relevant to this parser issue.","next_action":"Inspect the repository to locate the CSV header parser and its tests, then implement the smallest targeted change."}
